title: Alpha objective - daily-reinvested alpha must beat daily momentum (net of cost)
registered_by: user directive: best alpha for daily reinvestment; daily momentum must be beaten

decision.mode: ECHTES_TAGES_ALPHA (option B: horizon retrain, not cadence-only)
decision.intraday_daytrading: OUT OF SCOPE - impossible on EOD data (no intraday feed). Daily alpha = next-close to next-close, 1-day hold.

objective.success_criterion: net-of-cost daily-reinvested return stream must beat the 1-day-momentum benchmark on Sharpe AND not worse on max drawdown

implementation_required.model_retrain: horizon=1 label (close.shift(-1) -> close.shift(-2)); retrain full walk-forward. Predictability at 1-day horizon is LOW/noisy - edge will be thin.
implementation_required.one_day_momentum_benchmark: NOT IN SYSTEM (only 63/126/252/blend). Must ADD mom_1_topN = close/close.shift(1)-1, top N, rebalanced daily.
implementation_required.features: Current features are tuned for 10-day horizon (63/126/252d momentum). Short-horizon signal exists (rev_5, rev_10) but daily alpha may need dedicated short-horizon features.
implementation_required.cost_warning: Daily rebalance => ~5x rebalances (~3500) + massive turnover. Beating 1-day momentum NET of Trading212 fees + 2bps slippage is a HARD research bar.

gating.promote_to_champion_only_on_evidence: daily variant must demonstrably beat 1-day momentum net of cost before replacing productive champion

gap_vs_current_pipeline.implication: Current M1 baseline does NOT answer the daily objective; this is a strategy redefinition, not a tuning tweak.

cost_reality: Daily rebalancing greatly increases turnover -> higher fees/slippage. Beating daily momentum NET of cost is a hard bar; this is why the productive champion uses 5-day cadence.
placement: M3 research target (R0* tuning), AFTER M2 seal. Requires explicit go for heavy daily-rebalance backtests.
